---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for C0PL4ND
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that C0PL4ND makes hard or impossible today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about.

## Notes

C0PL4ND is local-first and account-free by design. Features that require
telemetry, remote accounts, or sending shell I/O off-device are out of scope.
